prompt: A long, narrow corridor stretches into the distance, its concrete floor cracked and broken, with patches of green weeds pushing through the fissures. The walls, once painted a pale gray, are now heavily damaged, with large sections of paint peeling away to reveal the rough, weathered surface beneath. Along the sides, rusted metal railings stand at intervals, their once-bright finish now faded and corroded. At the far end, a set of stairs ascends toward a dimly lit upper level, flanked by two escalators that appear to be out of service. A single, old-fashioned arcade machine stands abandoned on the left, its screen dark and its casing covered in grime. Fluorescent lights hang from the ceiling, casting a cold, artificial glow that barely illuminates the scene, highlighting the decay and abandonment that permeates the space. The overall atmosphere is one of quiet desolation, as if the place has been forgotten for a long time.
